name: LUCY C. MURRAY
summary: Senior Data Science and Analytics leader with 7+ years of experience spearheading advanced machine learning models, statistical analysis, and enterprise data engineering pipelines across complex sectors.
Proven track record designing robust predictive algorithms and migrating legacy architectures to modern, scalable production frameworks using Python, SQL, and cloud-integrated data environments.

Expert at translating intricate technical patterns and AI data solutions into high-visibility visualizations and actionable strategic insights for cross-functional business stakeholders and non-technical leadership.
Accomplished technical mentor who has scaled organizational data literacy and guided engineering teams through rigorous code reviews, MLOps best practices, and Agile delivery.

Project Management & Leadership: Lead advanced data science, predictive modeling, and analytics initiatives to develop scalable algorithms and machine learning solutions for federal, defense, and international enterprise environments.

Manage cross-functional engineering teams of up to 14+ members under Agile/Kanban frameworks, directing sprint agendas, conducting technical code reviews, and mentoring junior analysts in Python and statistical techniques.
Database Management & Advanced Analytics: Designed and deployed a machine learning prioritization model within production environments leveraging Python, SQL, and Palantir Foundry pipelines, reducing process subjectivity and optimizing cloud resource allocation.

Championed enterprise database migrations from legacy structures to modern, high-performance architectures using DuckDB, ensuring strict data governance, clean schema transformations, and rigorous feature engineering.
Replaced manual, spreadsheet-heavy workflows with automated, highly optimized programmatic pipelines to discover meaningful patterns, trends, and statistical relationships in massive data tranches.

Engineered interactive, high-visibility business intelligence tools and data visualizations, translating complex risk metrics and algorithmic outcomes into clear recommendations for executive stakeholders.

Database Engineering & Quality Control: Automated data workflows and predictive solutions, developing advanced SQL views, stored procedures, and indexes to optimize data retrieval speeds and front-end infrastructure performance.
Leveraged Python and SQL to clean, transform, and analyze massive relational datasets, identifying key operational trends and generating foundational industry analytics reports.
Designed and implemented automated data validation routines and causal analysis to audit legacy records under strict 48-hour data ingestion and production deployment deadlines.
Project Management & Professional Traini: Designed and executed firm-wide data analysis training programs that standardized database architecture ingestion, reporting protocols, and analytics adoption across multiple cross-functional teams.

education: Professional Certificate in Data Science, Montgomery College | 2019 – 2020
B.A., Economics, Government & Politics, University of Maryland, College Park | 2013 – 2017

skills.Leadership: Agile Methodologies (Kanban), Project Management, Cross-functional Team Leadership, Mentorship & Code Reviews
skills.Data Science & Analytics: Predictive Prioritization Modeling, Factor Analysis, Statistical Sampling, Data Visualization, MLOps
skills.Technical Toolkit: Python, R (Shiny, ggplot2), SQL (MS SQL, DuckDB), Palantir Foundry, Power BI, Git/GitLab
